legislative_actions.outcome: Suggested that Congress pass Act making 40 acres of original allotment inalienable during life of allottee

Suggested reserving 20 acres for home from individual funds before turning property over
Suggested 20 to 40 acres be held in trust for home site
Resulted in issuance of last sixty patents mentioned by Stinchecum
